inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the room in feet

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the room in feet

businessContext_i18n.es: Largo de la habitación en pies

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the room in feet

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the room in feet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la pièce en pieds
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la habitación en pies

inputs.label: Insulation Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for average, 0.8 for good, 1.2 for poor insulation

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for average, 0.8 for good, 1.2 for poor insulation
businessContext_i18n.de: 1,0 für durchschnittlich, 0,8 für gut, 1,2 für schlechte Isolierung
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1,0 pour moyenne, 0,8 pour bonne, 1,2 pour mauvaise isolation
businessContext_i18n.es: 1.0 para promedio, 0.8 para bueno, 1.2 para aislamiento deficiente

inputs.label: Total Window Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area of windows in square feet

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area of windows in square feet
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fit kare cinsinden toplam pencere alanı
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale des fenêtres en pieds carrés
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de ventanas en pies cuadrados

inputs.label: Number of Occupants
inputs.businessContext: Average number of people in the room

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of people in the room
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl von Personen im Raum
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de personnes dans la pièce
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de personas en la habitación

inputs.label: Additional Appliance Heat
inputs.businessContext: Heat generated by appliances and electronics in BTU per hour

businessContext_i18n.en: Heat generated by appliances and electronics in BTU per hour
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cihazlar ve elektronik ekipman tarafından saat başına BTU cinsinden üretilen ısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Wärme, die von Geräten und Elektronik erzeugt wird, in BTU pro Stunde
businessContext_i18n.fr: Chaleur générée par les appareils et l'électronique en BTU par heure
businessContext_i18n.es: Calor generado por electrodomésticos y electrónicos en BTU por hora

formulas.totalBTU: roomLength * roomWidth * ceilingHeight * 5 * insulationFactor + windowArea * 30 + occupants * 600 + applianceHeat

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
